headline: Marc Guehi
body: England defender Marc Guehi's absence from training today viewed as precautionary. Expectation he is fit for Saturday's World Cup quarter-final against Norway. bbc.co.uk/sport/football/art… Link World Cup 2026: Jordan Henderson not ruled out of finals after surgery on broken arm Jordan Henderson has not been ruled out of playing for England again during the World Cup despite undergoing surgery on a broken arm. bbc.co.uk
raw_text:
England defender Marc Guehi's absence from training today viewed as precautionary. Expectation he is fit for Saturday's World Cup quarter-final against Norway. 

bbc.co.uk/sport/football/art…

Link



World Cup 2026: Jordan Henderson not ruled out of finals after surgery on broken arm

Jordan Henderson has not been ruled out of playing for England again during the World Cup despite undergoing surgery on a broken arm.
